projectDescription: A Minecraft mod that adds television screens, viewfinder cameras, and cassette tapes with live video feeds and multi-block displays
keyFeatures: Multi-block television screens that can connect to form larger displays
Viewfinder blocks that function as security cameras with adjustable pitch and yaw
Cassette tape system with custom video content and GIF support
Live broadcast system for linking viewfinders to television displays
CRT visual effects and custom shaders for authentic retro television experience
Redstone integration with analog output signals
Compatibility with Fabric and NeoForge mod loaders
publicApiSurface: TVBlockEntity - Block entity handling TV display and cassette playback
ViewFinderBlock - Rotatable camera block with broadcast capabilities
ViewFinderBlockEntity - Block entity managing camera orientation and feeds
CassetteItem - Item representing video cassette tapes
HollowCassetteItem - Item for linking to live camera feeds
BroadcastManager - System for managing viewfinder connections and video feeds
BroadcastLocationType - Registry for broadcast location types
CASSETTE_TAPE_REGISTRY_KEY - Registry key for cassette tapes
LiveFeedTexture - Texture for rendering live camera feeds
VistaLevelRenderer - Custom level renderer for camera views
LINKED_FEED_COMPONENT - Data component for linked camera feeds
CASSETTE_TAPE_COMPONENT - Data component for cassette tape data
